generalGuidelines: All requests should include a unique 'requestId' parameter for reliable idempotency and de-duplication.
The language ('language' parameter) should default to 'sw' (Swahili) for the preliminary East African rollout.
Direct custom messages should use '/api/send' or '/api/send-sms' for controlled custom operational triggers.

CustomerCheckoutService.desc: Triggered when a customer makes an order.

MerchantNotificationService.desc: Triggered to notify a seller of newly assigned purchase orders.

dataVariables.sellerName: Register name of the vendor store

EscrowPaymentService.desc: Triggered when order payment is successfully secured in the ORBI safe-custody escrow locker.

DeliveryTrackingService.desc: Triggered when buyer confirms that goods have arrived in good order.

MerchantDisputeService.desc: Triggered when buyer opens a dispute/protection ticket on a faulty item or delayed shipment.

EscrowRefundService.desc: Triggered when money is safely sent back to customer's account/mobile money wallet.

templates.name: SHOP_ORDER_CREATED
templates.subject: Tumepokea oda yako {{orderId}}
templates.body: Habari {{customerName}}, tumepokea oda yako {{orderId}} ya {{currency}} {{amount}}. Malipo yakithibitishwa, tutamlinda mnunuzi na muuzaji kupitia mfumo salama wa ORBI Shop. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_ORDER_CREATED
templates.body: ORBI Shop: Oda {{orderId}} imepokelewa. Kiasi {{currency}} {{amount}}. Tutakujulisha malipo na usafirishaji yakithibitishwa. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_SELLER_NEW_ORDER
templates.subject: Oda mpya imeingia {{orderId}}
templates.body: Habari {{sellerName}}, umepokea oda mpya {{orderId}} kutoka kwa {{customerName}}. Thibitisha bidhaa na hatua za usafirishaji ndani ya ORBI Shop. Kiasi: {{currency}} {{amount}}. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_SELLER_NEW_ORDER
templates.body: ORBI Shop: Oda mpya {{orderId}} imeingia. Mteja: {{customerName}}. Kiasi {{currency}} {{amount}}. Fungua ORBI Shop kuthibitisha.

templates.name: SHOP_ESCROW_FUNDED
templates.subject: Malipo ya oda {{orderId}} yamelindwa
templates.body: Habari {{customerName}}, malipo ya {{currency}} {{amount}} kwa oda {{orderId}} yamelindwa kwenye ORBI Escrow. Muuzaji atalipwa baada ya uthibitisho wa kupokea bidhaa. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_ESCROW_FUNDED
templates.body: ORBI Shop: Malipo ya oda {{orderId}} yamelindwa kwenye escrow. Kiasi {{currency}} {{amount}}. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_DELIVERY_CONFIRMED
templates.subject: Uthibitisho wa bidhaa kwa oda {{orderId}}
templates.body: Habari {{customerName}}, tumepokea uthibitisho wa bidhaa kwa oda {{orderId}}. Kama kila kitu kiko sawa, malipo yataendelea kwa muuzaji kulingana na sera za ORBI Shop. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_DELIVERY_CONFIRMED
templates.body: ORBI Shop: Uthibitisho wa bidhaa kwa oda {{orderId}} umepokelewa. Malipo yataendelea kulingana na sera. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_DISPUTE_OPENED
templates.subject: Kesi ya oda {{orderId}} imefunguliwa
templates.body: Habari {{customerName}}, kesi ya oda {{orderId}} imefunguliwa na timu ya ORBI Shop itapitia taarifa zako. Tafadhali usifanye malipo nje ya mfumo. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_DISPUTE_OPENED
templates.body: ORBI Shop: Kesi ya oda {{orderId}} imefunguliwa. Timu yetu itapitia taarifa na kukujulisha hatua inayofuata. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_REFUND_PROCESSED
templates.subject: Refund ya oda {{orderId}} imechakatwa
templates.body: Habari {{customerName}}, refund ya {{currency}} {{amount}} kwa oda {{orderId}} imechakatwa. Muda wa kuonekana kwenye akaunti unaweza kutegemea njia ya malipo. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_REFUND_PROCESSED
templates.body: ORBI Shop: Refund ya oda {{orderId}} imechakatwa. Kiasi {{currency}} {{amount}}. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_CAMPAIGN_PROMO_BUYERS
templates.subject: Ofa Kabambe ya Wiki! Fursa ya Kununua kwa Bei Nafuu
templates.body: Habari {{recipientName}}, kuna ofa mpya kwenye ORBI Shop kwa ajili yako. Nunua kwa amani kupitia mfumo salama wa escrow na upate bidhaa kutoka kwa wauzaji waliothibitishwa. Fungua ofa hapa: {{actionLink}}

templates.name: SHOP_CAMPAIGN_PROMO_BUYERS
templates.body: ORBI Shop: Ofa kabambe kwa ajili yako pekee leo! Pata punguzo kubwa la bei hapa: {{actionLink}}

templates.name: SHOP_CAMPAIGN_PROMO_SELLERS
templates.subject: Ongeza Mauzo ya Duka Lako - ORBI Shop Seller Guide
templates.body: Habari {{recipientName}}, ORBI Shop imekuandalia mwongozo wa kuongeza mauzo, kuboresha bidhaa zako, na kujenga uaminifu kwa wateja. Fungua mwongozo hapa: {{actionLink}}

templates.name: SHOP_CAMPAIGN_PROMO_SELLERS
templates.body: ORBI Partner: Ongeza mauzo ya duka lako kwa kuboresha orodha na bidhaa zako. Soma zaidi hapa: {{actionLink}}

templates.name: SHOP_ORDER_CREATED
templates.subject: We received your order {{orderId}}
templates.body: Hello {{customerName}}, we received your order {{orderId}} for {{currency}} {{amount}}. Once payment is confirmed, ORBI Shop will protect both buyer and seller through our secure marketplace flow. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_ORDER_CREATED
templates.body: ORBI Shop: Order {{orderId}} received. Amount {{currency}} {{amount}}. We will notify you once payment and delivery are confirmed. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_SELLER_NEW_ORDER
templates.subject: New order received {{orderId}}
templates.body: Hello {{sellerName}}, you have received a new order {{orderId}} from {{customerName}}. Please confirm the item and delivery steps inside ORBI Shop. Amount: {{currency}} {{amount}}. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_SELLER_NEW_ORDER
templates.body: ORBI Shop: New order {{orderId}} received. Customer: {{customerName}}. Amount {{currency}} {{amount}}. Open ORBI Shop to confirm.

templates.name: SHOP_ESCROW_FUNDED
templates.subject: Payment for order {{orderId}} is protected
templates.body: Hello {{customerName}}, your payment of {{currency}} {{amount}} for order {{orderId}} is now protected in ORBI Escrow. The seller will be paid after delivery confirmation according to ORBI Shop policy. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_ESCROW_FUNDED
templates.body: ORBI Shop: Payment for order {{orderId}} is protected in escrow. Amount {{currency}} {{amount}}. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_DELIVERY_CONFIRMED
templates.subject: Delivery confirmation for order {{orderId}}
templates.body: Hello {{customerName}}, we received delivery confirmation for order {{orderId}}. If everything is okay, payment will proceed to the seller according to ORBI Shop policy. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_DELIVERY_CONFIRMED
templates.body: ORBI Shop: Delivery confirmation for order {{orderId}} has been received. Payment will continue according to policy. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_DISPUTE_OPENED
templates.subject: Dispute opened for order {{orderId}}
templates.body: Hello {{customerName}}, a dispute has been opened for order {{orderId}} and the ORBI Shop team will review your information. Please do not make payments outside the platform. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_DISPUTE_OPENED
templates.body: ORBI Shop: A dispute has been opened for order {{orderId}}. Our team will review the details and update you on the next step. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_REFUND_PROCESSED
templates.subject: Refund for order {{orderId}} has been processed
templates.body: Hello {{customerName}}, your refund of {{currency}} {{amount}} for order {{orderId}} has been processed. The time it takes to appear may depend on your payment method. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_REFUND_PROCESSED
templates.body: ORBI Shop: Refund for order {{orderId}} has been processed. Amount {{currency}} {{amount}}. Ref: {{refId}}

templates.name: SHOP_CAMPAIGN_PROMO_BUYERS
templates.subject: Weekly Deal Alert! Buy Safely at Better Prices
templates.body: Hello {{recipientName}}, there is a new ORBI Shop offer for you. Buy with confidence through secure escrow and verified sellers. Open the offer here: {{actionLink}}

templates.name: SHOP_CAMPAIGN_PROMO_BUYERS
templates.body: ORBI Shop: A special offer is available for you today. Get better prices here: {{actionLink}}

templates.name: SHOP_CAMPAIGN_PROMO_SELLERS
templates.subject: Grow Your Store - ORBI Shop Seller Guide
templates.body: Hello {{recipientName}}, ORBI Shop has prepared a seller guide to help you grow sales, improve listings, and build buyer trust. Open the guide here: {{actionLink}}

templates.name: SHOP_CAMPAIGN_PROMO_SELLERS
templates.body: ORBI Partner: Grow your store by improving your listings and products. Read more here: {{actionLink}}
